query: ok so the PM just assigned me BEP-2341 — it's a new endpoint to let admins bulk-deactivate users. the ticket has ACs and subtasks. can you build it?
production is on fire, users can't log in, it's been 45 minutes. need to hotfix this NOW. BEP-1992 --hotfix
i want to add rate limiting to the auth routes in tathep-platform-api. it's a new middleware, probably touches 3-4 files. let's build it
can you implement BEP-1845 for me? it's a refactor to move the payment processing logic out of the controller into a separate service layer
there's a small bug where the user profile endpoint returns a 500 when the avatar_url is null. it's a quick fix in UserController.ts. fix it using the dev loop
i need to implement the full notification system from BEP-2210 — push notifications, in-app alerts, email digest. it's a big feature
let's do the whole dev loop for this: add pagination to the /users list endpoint. currently it returns all users which is killing the DB
can you pick up BEP-1776 and run through the full development workflow? it's a medium-sized refactor of how we handle file uploads
run dlc-build on this: i need to add a soft-delete mechanism (deleted_at column) to the articles table and update all queries to filter it out
the checkout flow is broken in prod after the deploy at 2pm. BEP-9001 --hotfix. customers can't complete purchases
hey can you review my PR #847? i just added the OAuth2 Google login feature and want a thorough review before i merge
can you respond to the reviewer comments on PR #801? they asked me to extract the validation logic and add error codes. about 5 comments total
i need to debug why the /api/reports endpoint is timing out in production. it started happening after the migration last night, been going on for 3 hours
the memory usage on our API server keeps climbing until it OOMs after about 6 hours under load. help me find the leak
i made a small change to update the error message in auth middleware to be more descriptive. can you commit it with a conventional commit message?
need to write a quick one-off migration script to backfill the country_code column for existing users based on their phone_number. not a feature, just a data fix we need to run once
the CI pipeline failed on PR #912 — there's a TypeScript error in UserService.spec.ts line 42 about a missing property. can you look at the diff and suggest what's wrong?
can you explain how the Effect-TS Layer system works in our codebase? specifically how services get injected into use cases and how to add a new service dependency
i want to add a unit test for the calculateTax function in TaxService.ts — it doesn't have any tests yet and i want to cover edge cases
can you search the codebase for all places where we call db.query() directly without going through the repository layer? want to know the scope before i start the cleanup
